idea-plugin.name: Prism - IDE Companion for Claude Code
idea-plugin.description:
Prism is a local visual wrapper that integrates the Claude Code CLI directly into your JetBrains IDE. It runs the CLI in a real embedded terminal and makes no external API calls — all data stays on your machine.

Requires the Claude Code CLI installed and authenticated independently.

Features

  • Interactive Terminal — Full ANSI color support via PTY (pty4j + JediTerm)
  • Claude Changes Panel — Per-interaction diff view with history navigation and one-click revert
  • Context Menu — Explain, Review, Fix, Generate Tests, Refactor from the editor
  • Toolbar — Model (opus/sonnet/haiku), Effort, Cost, Resume, Compact
  • Prompt Templates — Reusable templates with {selection}, {file}, {language} variables
  • Conversation History — Browse and resume past conversations with full-text search
  • Multi-Session — Multiple simultaneous sessions in independent tabs
  • Status Bar Widget — Real-time session state (working/idle/stopped)
  • i18n — English, Portuguese, Spanish

Compatibility

  • IntelliJ IDEA (Community & Ultimate)
  • GoLand, WebStorm, PyCharm, CLion, Rider, RubyMine, and other JetBrains IDEs
  • Requires IDE version 2024.3 or later

Open Source & Contributing

Prism is open source under the Apache License 2.0. Found a bug or have a suggestion? Open an issue or submit a pull request on GitHub.

Disclaimer

Prism is an independent, community-built project — not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Anthropic, PBC. "Claude" and "Claude Code" are trademarks of Anthropic, PBC.

This software is provided as-is, without warranty of any kind. See the LICENSE for details.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
v1.1.1 — Marketplace Prep

  • Fix: Resolved write-unsafe context error on DiffPanel refresh during tab selection
  • Added dark theme plugin icon (pluginIcon_dark.svg)

v1.1.0 — Compatibility Update

  • Compatibility: Removed upper IDE build limit — now works with IntelliJ 2024.3 and all future versions
  • Fix: Added explicit ActionUpdateThread declaration to all action classes
  • Dependencies: Updated Kotlin, JUnit, Gradle, and IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin to latest stable

v1.0.1

  • Fix: project path escaping for directories with underscores in conversation history
  • Added multi-strategy path resolution with fuzzy fallback

v1.0.0 — Initial Release

  • Interactive terminal with Claude Code CLI
  • Claude Changes: per-interaction diff view with revert
  • Context menu actions (Explain, Review, Fix, Generate Tests, Refactor)
  • Conversation history with full-text search
  • Multi-session support with independent tabs
  • Prompt templates with variable substitution
  • Status bar widget with session state
  • i18n: English, Portuguese, Spanish
  • CI/CD via GitHub Actions

action.description: Show diff of changes made by Claude
Send selected text to Claude Code

group.description: Send code to Claude with a prompt

action.description: Ask Claude to explain this code
Ask Claude to review this code
Ask Claude to fix this code
Ask Claude to write tests for this code
Ask Claude to refactor this code
